text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has claimed more than seven
crowns: an unprecedented feat. She has
cemented her place in history as an emperor
among emperors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What could possibly serve as a suitable reward?
We think it over together during a well-deserved
moment of peace.
